bloodedvr.hero_tagline: A green-glow profile site for my games, projects, websites, and whatever I'm into.
bloodedvr.intro_note: Usually playing Animal Company, testing a new idea, or making this site cooler.
bloodedvr.about: Hey, I'm BloodedVR. I like Animal Company, Roblox, Minecraft, VR games, and more. This is my own profile page where I can post updates, share my links, and show what I'm about.
more: I like retro game menus and glowing terminal UI.
I enjoy making websites feel personal instead of generic.
This whole profile can be edited from the admin panel.
announcements: Username profile pages are now enabled.

posts.title: Welcome To My Page
posts.body: This is my own little corner of the internet with my games, websites, and updates.

posts.title: What I Like
posts.body: Animal Company, Roblox, Minecraft, VR games, and more fun stuff.

timeline: Built a retro green profile page
Turned it into a username-based profile system
bloodedvr.footer_note: BloodedVR profile powered by Python and ready for Render.
